Auth.portalDesc: A unified platform for administrators, instructors, and trainees to manage academic operations efficiently.

Landing.heroDesc: One platform for administrators, instructors, and students. Manage everything — from attendance and grades to payments and announcements.
Landing.featuresDesc: A complete suite of tools designed to simplify technical administration and enhance the learning experience.
Landing.ctaDesc: Join hundreds of technical programs already using Assiut Metals Technical School to streamline operations.

features.title: Smart Analytics
features.desc: Real-time dashboards with attendance trends, grade distributions, and performance insights.

features.title: Secure & Compliant

features.title: Built-in Messaging

features.title: Smart Scheduling

features.title: Multi-language

testimonials.name: Dr. Sarah Johnson
testimonials.text: Assiut Metals Technical School transformed how we run our technical programs. Attendance is now fully automated and instructors get instant updates.

testimonials.name: Mr. Ahmed Hassan
testimonials.text: Grading lab assignments and sending feedback to trainees has never been faster. I save hours every week.

testimonials.name: Omar Tariq
testimonials.text: I can see my attendance and workshop grades in real-time. It helps me stay on track with my industrial training.

Footer.desc: Advanced technical and vocational training for Egypt's industrial sector.

Admissions.heroDesc: We welcome applications from motivated students who are ready to invest in their technical education. Our streamlined admission process is designed to be transparent and efficient.

steps.title: Submit Online Application
steps.desc: Complete the digital application form with your personal details, academic history, and program preference.

steps.title: Document Verification
steps.desc: Upload copies of your academic transcripts, national ID, and a recent passport photograph for review.

steps.title: Entrance Assessment
steps.desc: Attend a scheduled aptitude assessment in mathematics and general sciences at the main campus.

steps.title: Admission Decision
steps.desc: Receive your admission letter via email within 10 business days of completing all requirements.

requirements: Secondary school certificate (Science or Technical track)
Minimum cumulative GPA of 2.5 / 4.0 or equivalent
Medical fitness certificate from an accredited clinic
Completed application form with guardian signature

faqs.a: Applications are accepted on a rolling basis until all seats are filled. Early application is strongly recommended.

faqs.q: Can I transfer credits from another school?
faqs.a: Yes, credit transfer is evaluated on a case-by-case basis. Submit official transcripts during the application process.
Merit-based scholarships covering up to 50% of tuition are available for high-achieving students. Need-based aid is also offered.

faqs.q: What is the language of instruction?
faqs.a: Primary instruction is in Arabic with English technical terminology. All textbooks and lab manuals are in English.
On-campus housing is available for out-of-city students. Applications for housing are separate and processed on a first-come basis.

Admissions.ctaDesc: Take the first step toward a skilled career. Our admissions team is here to guide you through the enrollment process.

About.heroDesc: Since 2005, Assiut Metals Technical School has been dedicated to preparing skilled technicians through rigorous practical training and industry-aligned curricula.
About.missionDesc: To deliver high-quality technical secondary education that equips students with the specialized skills, discipline, and professional ethics required for the modern industrial workforce.

timeline.title: Foundation
timeline.desc: Assiut Metals Technical School was established to provide foundational vocational training in metallurgy and engineering.

timeline.title: Accreditation
timeline.desc: Received national accreditation from the Ministry of Education for all secondary technical programs.

timeline.title: Expansion
timeline.desc: Opened a new practical training wing with 12 specialized laboratories.

timeline.title: Digital Transformation
timeline.desc: Launched a comprehensive digital learning platform for modern technical instruction.

timeline.title: Recognition
timeline.desc: Ranked among the top technical secondary schools in the region for graduate industry placement.

values.title: Excellence
values.desc: We pursue the highest standards in curriculum design, instruction, and institutional governance.

values.title: Innovation
values.desc: We foster a culture of experimentation, encouraging students to develop creative solutions to real-world challenges.

values.title: Integrity
values.desc: We maintain transparency, accountability, and ethical conduct in all academic and administrative processes.

values.title: Inclusivity
values.desc: We welcome students from diverse backgrounds and provide equitable access to educational opportunities.

leadership.name: Dr. Khalid Al-Rashid
leadership.desc: Ph.D. in Engineering Education, 20+ years in academic leadership.

leadership.name: Prof. Amira Saeed
leadership.desc: Specialist in curriculum development and quality assurance.

leadership.name: Eng. Faisal Nouri
leadership.desc: Former industry executive with 15 years in civil engineering.

leadership.name: Dr. Layla Mahmoud
leadership.desc: Expert in student development and academic counseling.

About.visionDesc: To be recognized as the leading technical institute in the region, distinguished by the caliber of our graduates, the rigor of our programs, and our contribution to national economic development through applied research and community engagement.

News.heroDesc: Stay informed about the latest developments, achievements, and events at Assiut Metals Technical School.

newsList.title: Assiut Metals Center Ranked Among Top 10 Technical Institutions in the Region
newsList.excerpt: The annual regional higher education rankings have placed Assiut Metals Center among the top ten technical and vocational institutions for the third consecutive year, citing strong graduate employment outcomes and industry partnerships.

newsList.title: New Partnership Signed with Saudi Aramco for Industrial Training Program
newsList.excerpt: Assiut Metals Center has formalized a strategic partnership with Saudi Aramco, enabling selected students in the Chemical and Mechanical Engineering programs to complete their practical training at Aramco facilities.

newsList.title: Launch of Advanced Cybersecurity Laboratory
newsList.excerpt: The Information Technology department has inaugurated a state-of-the-art cybersecurity lab equipped with industry-standard tools, honeypot environments, and SIEM platforms for student training.

newsList.title: Applications for Merit Scholarships Now Open
newsList.excerpt: The Registrar's office has announced that applications for the 2025–2026 merit-based scholarship program are now open. Eligible students with a GPA of 3.5 or above are encouraged to apply before the March 31 deadline.

newsList.title: Engineering Exhibition 2024 Attracts 30+ Industry Recruiters
newsList.excerpt: The annual engineering exhibition drew significant industry interest this year, with over 30 company representatives attending to evaluate student projects and conduct on-site interviews.

newsList.title: Dr. Layla Mahmoud Receives National Excellence in Teaching Award
newsList.excerpt: The Ministry of Education has recognized Dr. Layla Mahmoud, Director of Student Affairs, with the National Excellence in Teaching Award for her contributions to innovative pedagogical methods.

FAQ.heroDesc: Find answers to common questions about our programs, admissions process, and student life.

questions.a: Applicants must hold a secondary school certificate in the Science or Technical track with a minimum GPA of 2.5/4.0, a valid national ID, a medical fitness certificate, and passport-sized photographs.
Applications open on June 1 each year for the upcoming academic year. Priority deadline is August 15. We recommend applying early as seats are limited.

questions.q: Can I transfer credits from another institution?
questions.a: Yes. Credit transfer is evaluated case-by-case by the Academic Affairs department. Submit official transcripts with your application.
Yes. Tuition can be paid in two equal installments per semester. The first installment is due at registration; the second is due at mid-semester.

questions.q: How do I apply for a scholarship?
questions.a: Scholarships are awarded automatically based on your submitted academic records. Need-based grants require a separate application form available from the Registrar's office.
The EGP 500 application fee is non-refundable regardless of the admission decision.

questions.q: What is the language of instruction?
questions.a: Primary instruction is conducted in Arabic. English is used for technical terminology, and all textbooks and lab manuals are in English.

questions.q: How many courses are taken per semester?
questions.a: Full-time students typically take 5–6 courses per semester, totaling approximately 18–21 credit hours.

questions.q: Is there a library on campus?
questions.a: Yes. Our library is open Sunday through Thursday from 08:00 to 20:00 and provides access to physical and digital resources, including IEEE and Elsevier databases.
On-campus housing is available for out-of-city students on a first-come, first-served basis. Applications for housing are submitted separately through the Student Affairs office.
Yes. Bus routes connecting key city areas to the campus operate Sunday through Thursday. Schedules are published at the start of each semester.
We have over 20 active student clubs including the Robotics Club, the Programming Society, the Environmental Club, and various sports and cultural groups.

Fees.heroDesc: We provide transparent fee structures and flexible payment options to ensure our technical programs remain accessible.

scholarships.name: National Honors Award
scholarships.criteria: Top 1% of national secondary school results

scholarships.name: Sibling Discount
scholarships.criteria: Second or subsequent family member enrolled

Gallery.heroDesc: Explore our state-of-the-art facilities, workshops, and vibrant student activities through our visual gallery.

Transportation.heroDesc: Safe, reliable, and convenient bus services connecting major districts to our campus.

Events.heroDesc: Join us for workshops, seminars, and community gatherings that enrich the technical education experience.
Events.ctaDesc: Follow our announcements to never miss an important event or deadline.

upcomingEvents.title: Open Day 2025
upcomingEvents.desc: Tour our facilities, meet faculty members, and learn about our academic programs. Open to prospective students and their families.

upcomingEvents.title: Annual Engineering Exhibition
upcomingEvents.desc: Students from all engineering departments showcase their capstone projects. Industry partners and recruiters are invited to evaluate innovations.

upcomingEvents.title: Cybersecurity Workshop
upcomingEvents.desc: Hands-on workshop covering penetration testing fundamentals, network security auditing, and incident response protocols.

upcomingEvents.title: Career Fair – Summer 2025
upcomingEvents.desc: Connect with 30+ leading employers from the engineering, technology, and manufacturing sectors. Bring your CV and professional attire.

upcomingEvents.title: Faculty Research Symposium
upcomingEvents.desc: Faculty members present their latest research findings across disciplines. Open to students and academic staff.

upcomingEvents.title: New Student Orientation
upcomingEvents.desc: Mandatory orientation for all newly admitted students. Covers academic policies, campus services, and student code of conduct.

Teachers.heroDesc: Our faculty comprises distinguished academics and seasoned industry professionals who bring both theoretical depth and practical expertise to the classroom.
Teachers.ctaDesc: We are always seeking qualified professionals to join our academic team. Submit your CV and cover letter to our HR department.

Programs.heroDesc: Comprehensive vocational and technical diploma programs designed to meet the evolving demands of the industrial sector.
Programs.ctaTitle: Ready to Start Your Technical Career?
Programs.ctaDesc: Applications for the 2025–2026 academic year are now open. Begin your journey today.
Programs.program1Desc: Comprehensive study of hardware architecture, embedded systems, networking fundamentals, and software development. Graduates are prepared for roles in IT infrastructure, systems administration, and technical support.
Programs.program2Desc: Focused on electrical power generation, transmission, distribution systems, and renewable energy technologies. Includes extensive laboratory work with industrial-grade equipment.
Programs.program3Desc: Covers manufacturing processes, materials science, thermodynamics, and CAD/CAM systems. Students gain hands-on experience in precision machining and quality control.
Programs.program4Desc: Study of structural analysis, construction management, surveying, and building materials. Prepares students for careers in construction supervision and infrastructure planning.
Programs.program5Desc: Training in chemical process operations, safety management, quality assurance, and environmental compliance. Aligned with petrochemical and pharmaceutical industry standards.
Programs.program6Desc: Covers full-stack web development, mobile application development, cybersecurity fundamentals, and cloud computing. Industry-aligned certification pathways included.

Policies.heroDesc: Our comprehensive guidelines ensuring a safe, respectful, and academically rigorous environment for all students and staff.

policiesList.title: Academic Integrity Policy
content: Students are expected to uphold the highest standards of academic honesty in all coursework, examinations, and research activities.
Plagiarism, unauthorized collaboration, fabrication of data, and any form of academic fraud will result in disciplinary action, which may include course failure or dismissal.
All submitted work must be the student's original work. Proper citation of all sources is mandatory in accordance with IEEE referencing standards.
Violations are reviewed by the Academic Integrity Committee and decisions may be appealed through the Dean's office within 14 days.

policiesList.title: Attendance Policy
content: Regular attendance is mandatory for all lectures, laboratory sessions, and assessments. Students are expected to attend at least 75% of all scheduled class hours per course.
Students who fall below the 75% attendance threshold will be barred from the final examination and awarded a failing grade (DN) for that course.
Absences due to medical emergencies or official institutional activities may be excused with appropriate documentation submitted within 5 business days.
Consistent late arrival is treated as an attendance issue. Three instances of tardiness equal one absence.

policiesList.title: Privacy & Data Protection Policy
content: Assiut Metals Center collects and processes personal data strictly in accordance with applicable data protection legislation.
Student records, academic performance data, and personal information are stored securely and are accessible only to authorized personnel.
Data is never sold or shared with third parties for commercial purposes. Sharing with accreditation bodies and regulatory authorities is conducted under data sharing agreements.
Students have the right to access, correct, and request deletion of their personal data. Requests should be submitted to the Data Protection Officer.

policiesList.title: Code of Conduct
content: All students are expected to treat fellow students, faculty, and staff with respect and dignity at all times, both on campus and in digital communications.
Harassment, discrimination, bullying, or any form of misconduct based on gender, nationality, religion, or disability is strictly prohibited.
Damage to institutional property, unauthorized access to facilities, or possession of prohibited items are grounds for immediate disciplinary proceedings.
The Student Affairs office is available to receive and investigate complaints confidentially. Retaliation against complainants is prohibited.
